mapper.select: SELECT badge_id, badge_name, badge_description, badge_conditions FROM badges
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO challenge (user_id, badge_id, succeeded_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{badgeId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND temporary = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND temporary = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) as review_count FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND temporary = 0 GROUP BY category ORDER BY review_count DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT category FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND temporary = 0 GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minReviewCount} ) as category_counts
